description: Let admins manage workspace membership and review audit history.

userStories.title: Add membership change audit persistence
userStories.description: As a system administrator, I want membership changes recorded in durable storage so that invite, role, and revoke actions can be reviewed later.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace membership change events are stored with actor, target member, action, and timestamp fields
Audit storage accepts invite, role-change, and revoke event types
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Invite workspace members by email
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email from workspace settings so that I can grant access without editing the database directly.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings include an invite flow that accepts an email address
Submitting a valid invite creates pending membership access for the selected workspace
The invite action records an audit event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Change workspace member roles
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that access matches current responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings expose role choices for viewer, editor, and admin
Changing a role persists the new role and updates the member list display
The role-change action records an audit event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former members cannot continue using the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings provide a revoke action for each current member
Revoking access removes the member from active workspace access lists
The revoke action records an audit event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Review recent membership changes in settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes on the settings page so that I can confirm who changed access and when.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings show a recent membership activity view sourced from audit events
The view includes invite, role-change, and revoke entries with actor and timestamp details
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
